violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Establishment must fix weather stripping. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024
The handle on the Starbucks low boy was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine has an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2024
